description: Legacy JSON fallback for release gate requirements (canonical: REQUIRED_CHECKS_POLICY.yml)
_note: LEGACY FALLBACK - canonical source is docs/ci/REQUIRED_CHECKS_POLICY.yml. Kept in sync for verify-green-for-tag.sh JSON fallback path (no yq). Check names MUST match actual GitHub status check names (workflow name + job name).

always_required.name: CI Core Gate ✅
always_required.rationale: Primary blocking gate - lint, typecheck, tests, build

always_required.name: Unit Tests
always_required.rationale: Primary PR test gate status required by branch protection

always_required.name: gate
always_required.rationale: Official GA gate job required by branch protection

always_required.name: Release Readiness Gate
always_required.rationale: Comprehensive release readiness verification - runs on every change

always_required.name: test (20.x)
always_required.rationale: Test suite and coverage gates must pass for all code changes

always_required.name: SOC Controls
always_required.rationale: SOC control verification is required for audit readiness

always_required.name: Workflow Validity Check
always_required.rationale: Workflow syntax validity is required by protected-branch checks

conditional_required.name: Workflow Lint
conditional_required.rationale: Validates GitHub Actions workflow syntax and safety

conditional_required.name: CodeQL
conditional_required.rationale: Security analysis for server and package code

conditional_required.name: SBOM & Vulnerability Scanning
conditional_required.rationale: Supply chain security for Docker and dependencies

conditional_required.name: Docker Build & Security Scan
conditional_required.rationale: Docker image build and security validation

evaluation_rules.description: Rules for computing required workflow set for a given commit
algorithm: a. Get changed files: git diff --name-only <base>..<commit>
b. For each changed file, check if it matches any regex in 'required_when_paths_match'
c. If any file matches, include the workflow in required set
3. 'informational' workflows are never required for promotion

status_interpretation.failure: Workflow failed - blocks promotion if required
status_interpretation.cancelled: Workflow was cancelled - blocks promotion if required
status_interpretation.timed_out: Workflow timed out - blocks promotion if required
status_interpretation.skipped: Workflow skipped by GitHub - treated as success if not required
status_interpretation.missing: Workflow did not run - blocks if required, OK if not required
